scripts.env:up: cd /root/wp-env/a2f1695a3ac249d65eabc5cd9da46ed2 && docker compose up -d mysql && docker rm -f wp-manual 2>/dev/null; docker run -d --name wp-manual --network a2f1695a3ac249d65eabc5cd9da46ed2_default -p 8888:80 -e WORDPRESS_DB_HOST=mysql -e WORDPRESS_DB_USER=root -e WORDPRESS_DB_PASSWORD=password -e WORDPRESS_DB_NAME=wordpress -v /root/wp-env/a2f1695a3ac249d65eabc5cd9da46ed2/WordPress:/var/www/html wordpress:php8.2 && docker exec wp-manual sh -c 'curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wp-cli/builds/gh-pages/phar/wp-cli.phar -o /usr/local/bin/wp && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/wp'
scripts.env:stop: docker rm -f wp-manual 2>/dev/null; cd /root/wp-env/a2f1695a3ac249d65eabc5cd9da46ed2 && docker compose down
